backlogLanes.note: The current route catalog covers curated aliases, but the backend still needs durable typo, phonetic, and ticker-shortcut protection beyond local ranking rules.
The screener UI is strong, but source-backed metric ingestion and durable filter indexing still need a backend table design.
Search quality still needs persistent query logs, zero-result audits, and ranking feedback before it can tune itself from real usage.
